LiFi Link Pro

Bulk Line-of-Sight Analyzer
Upload a KMZ file, set parameters, and analyze LOS for multiple point pairs.
Upload KMZ File

Max file size: 15MB. Ensure the KMZ contains point placemarks.

Analysis Parameters

Please upload a KMZ file with at least 2 placemarks.
